titleStmt.title: SII 15.225: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 225. (A.R. No. 470 of 1926.) AḶNĀVAR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying on a raised pial of the Jumma-masjid in Pyāṭi Street.
This is dated Śaka 1003, Wednesday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa, other details being lost. In the Śaka year 1003 corresponding to 1081 A.D., the Dakshiṇāyanasaṅkramaṇa occurred on June 26, Saturday.

It is known that Chālukya Vikramāditya VI was the imperial ruler at this time. But the inscription without mentioning his name states that the feudatory chief Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gūvaladēva of the Goa Kadamba family was governing the provinces of Koṅkaṇa Nine-hundred, Palasige Twelve-thousand, Kundūr Five-hundred, Kādaravaḷḷi Thirty, Kavadi-dvīpa One lakh and a quarter and other areas. The Kadamba Praśasti is recounted.

It registers a gift of land made after purchase by Narasiṅga-seṭṭi in favour of the Biḷiya-basadi which was constructed at the rājadhāni Aṇalāpura by Pradhāna Māchaṇṇa. It mentions the Jaina preceptors Rāmachandra and Bāḷachandra. The epigraph is worn out in certain places.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jina
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara banavāsipuravarēśvara
kāsabhāskarananēkasamaravijayōpārjjitavīraśrīnivāsa dakṣiṇadōrddaṇḍaṁ
ṇḍaḷika ma dōrddaṁḍa saiḷakhaṁḍanapaṭiṣṭhaniṣṭhurabhujādaṇḍana nūna dānavāri sa
kakalpadruma saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ mūrrtinārāyaṇaṁ kīrtti
ka caṭṭeyadēvarttatsutaṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷē
stabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna haradharaṇīprasūtatriḷōcana kadaṁba
ya bhyudayamāna mahāpracaṇḍamārttaṇḍa mārttaṇḍakarāti tībra
vaśīk® ṇḍaḷanuttuṁga siṁhalāṁchanaṁ vānaramahādhvajaṁ permmaṭṭi tūryya
catu ṣṭādaśāśvamēdha dīkṣādīkṣitakulaprasūtaṁ himavadgirīndra rundra śi
prabhāva tyāgajagajhaṁpa jhaṁpaḷācāryya subhaṭakanaka nikaśōpa
gatavajraprākāra lōkaikakalpadruma saṁkrāntidhavaḷa mūrttinārāyaṇa kī rttimārtaṇḍa maṇḍaḷikalalā
śrīmajjayakēśidēvarttatputra samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda banavāsi puravarādhīśvara sa
mastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna yamahīdharēndraśikharā
bhyudayamānamahāpracaṇḍamārttaṇḍa mārttaṇḍakarātitībranijapratāpa vaśīkrita sakaḷamahīmaṇḍa
ḷanuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchana vānaramahādhvaja permmaṭṭitūryya nirgghōṣaṇacaturāśīti nagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭādaśāśvamēdha
dīkṣādīkṣitakulaprasūta himavadgirīṁdrarundraśikharasthāpitamahāśaktiprabhāva tyāga jagajhaṁpa jhaṁpaḷācā
ryya niśśaṁkarāma subhaṭakanakanikaṣōpaḷa śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraṁ lōkaikakalpa drumaṁ saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ mū
rttinārāyaṇaṁ kīrttimārttaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭaṁ vairigharaṭṭa subhaṭarāja śikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītya
khiḷarājāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmadgōvaladēvarnnijarājadhāni koṁkaṇa vo bhaynū
ṟuṁ palasige pannircchāsiramaṁ kuṁndūraynūṟu yaynūṟa
grāma kādaravaḷḷiya mūvattu kā mūvatu . ka
vaḍidvīpasavalakkamumaṁ duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷana
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ vijayarājya saluttamire © sakaḷōrvvītaḷa ryyarssa
mastakaḷākōvidarā munīśvarara śiṣyarjñā tyadbhuta śābdi
kasaiddhāntikatārkkikē śrī rāmacandrōttamar khaṇḍitavrataṁ
guruvara bāḷacandramunipa nuta
narasiṁhaseṭṭi paḍedaṁ jasamaṁ vasudhātaḷāgradoḷ . svasti nādaradiṁ
māḍisidā jinālayake keyyaṁ māṟugoṇḍu mattara
narasiṁganittaniḷayaṁ candrārkkaruḷḷappina © sakavarṣa 1003 neya
budhavāradandu dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāntiyāge tatpuṇyadina mā
dhavabhaṭṭa pramukha brahmasabhaya nānādēsīya paṇḍitara sa rāja
dhāniyaṇalāpuradoḷ pradhānaṁ mācaṇnaṁ māḍisida śrī gaṇada baḷi
ya basadiya naiṣṭika riṣisamudāyakkācā(hā)radānakka rasananavaralli
geyyoṟu mattarumaṁ biṭṭa kēriya kōṇara narasiṁgayyaseṭṭiyayvattu bhāga bbarasi
candrārkkatāraṁ śāsavamāgi biṭṭaṁ © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē nīyō bhavadbhissa
rvānētānbhāvinaṟpārtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ bahu bhissagarādibhiryya
sya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . madvaṁśajā parama manasā bhuvi
bhāvi bhūpāla yē pālayanti mama dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ yē vā yō ha
rēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi visṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . na viṣaṁ viṣamē
kākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 15.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
